ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data_analyzer, historian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the passenger (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C, Q, S) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "boarding_point" TEXT /* Point of boarding */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_data" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger (foreign key) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival outcome (1 for survived, 0 for not survived) */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total family size of the passenger */,
  "family_type" TEXT /* Type of family structure (e.g., Alone, Medium) */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number (if survived) */,
  "reason_for_survival" TEXT /* Reason for survival (free text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_data_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insight */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the insight */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger related to the insight */,
  "insight_text" TEXT /* Text describing the insight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insights_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insights_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Binary data representing the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (e.g., admin, data_analyzer, historian)
Unique identifier for each survival record
Survival outcome (1 for survived, 0 for not survived)
Total family size of the passenger
Type of family structure (e.g., Alone, Medium)
Reference to the user who generated the insight
Reference to the passenger related to the insight
Reference to the user who generated the visualization
Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot)
